name: autodealers-platform
description: Plataforma SaaS multi-tenant para dealers y vendedores de autos

scripts.build:packages: cd packages/shared && npm run build && cd ../core && npm run build && cd ../crm && npm run build && cd ../inventory && npm run build && cd ../billing && npm run build && cd ../ai && npm run build && cd ../messaging && npm run build && cd ../reports && npm run build && cd ../..
scripts.build:all: npm run build:packages && npm run build:public && npm run build:admin && npm run build:dealer && npm run build:seller && npm run build:advertiser
scripts.deploy:public:firebase: firebase deploy --only apphosting:public-web-app && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:all:firebase: npm run deploy:public:firebase && npm run deploy:admin:firebase && npm run deploy:dealer:firebase && npm run deploy:seller:firebase && npm run deploy:advertiser:firebase
scripts.flutter:clean: cd autodealers_flutter && flutter clean && flutter pub get
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run build:flutter:web && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:flutter: npm run flutter:clean && npm run build:flutter:web && firebase deploy --only hosting
